- **Report it to the Federal Trade Commission (FTC)** in the U.S. at [ReportFraud.ftc.gov](https://www.ftc.gov/).

5. **Report the Email**: If you receive a phishing email, report it to the appropriate authorities, such as the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) in the United States or similar organizations in other countries.
